problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
